name: person-lookup
description: Look up a person — work history, education, social profiles, and contact info — via Nyne.ai's async person search, routed through the SELAT Router (tempo-native MPP).

query.description: Search query combining person name with company, role, or geography for disambiguation, e.g. "Dario Amodei Anthropic CEO".

steps.label: person search — Nyne.ai (async, MPP / tempo-native, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
